title: Manufacturing Engineer - Orient Electric - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Orient Electric - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Orient Electric are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Orient Electric:
Orient Electric is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Orient Electric!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
